task_completion.description: Verify that a top-level collection named 'Deep Learning Survey' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the left sidebar (collections pane) of Zotero, there should be a folder icon labeled exactly 'Deep Learning Survey'.

task_completion.description: Verify that a subcollection named 'NLP Papers' has been created under 'Deep Learning Survey'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the left sidebar of Zotero, there should be a folder labeled 'NLP Papers' visibly nested under the 'Deep Learning Survey' folder.

task_completion.description: Verify that a subcollection named 'Vision Papers' has been created under 'Deep Learning Survey'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the left sidebar of Zotero, there should be a folder labeled 'Vision Papers' visibly nested under the 'Deep Learning Survey' folder.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'NLP Papers' subcollection contains the 3 specified NLP papers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot where the 'NLP Papers' collection is selected in the left sidebar. The middle pane must list 'Attention Is All You Need', 'BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding', and 'Language Models are Few-Shot Learners'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Vision Papers' subcollection contains the 3 specified Vision papers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot where the 'Vision Papers' collection is selected in the left sidebar. The middle pane must list 'ImageNet Classification with Deep Convolutional Neural Networks', 'Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition', and 'Generative Adversarial Nets'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the Zotero GUI to organize the papers.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Zotero application window with active selections, dragging/dropping, or context menus being used, rather than a terminal window executing scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the collections and papers are actual Zotero UI elements.
integrity.visual_evidence: The collections must appear in the Zotero left pane with standard Zotero folder icons, and papers must appear in the middle pane with standard Zotero item icons. They should not be typed out in a text editor or notes app.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the UI by directly modifying the Zotero SQLite database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots showing terminal commands like 'sqlite3 zotero.sqlite' or Python scripts manipulating the Zotero database directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a top-level collection named 'Deep Learning Survey' with two nested subcollections: 'NLP Papers' and 'Vision Papers'. The 'NLP Papers' collection must contain exactly three papers: 'Attention Is All You Need', 'BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding', and 'Language Models are Few-Shot Learners'. The 'Vision Papers' collection must contain exactly three papers: 'ImageNet Classification with Deep Convolutional Neural Networks', 'Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition', and 'Generative Adversarial Nets'. All papers are pre-loaded in the Zotero library.
